title: Political Systems
shortSummary: Compare the world's political systems — parliamentary, presidential, federal, unitary — and understand how Australia's Westminster system works in practice.
whyItMatters: You cannot navigate a system you don't understand. Knowing how Australia's three levels of government work, how power is distributed, and how your system compares globally is the baseline for any political career.
coreConcepts: The role of the Governor-General and the Crown
